narrative:
Loveland City B (precinct in Clermont County) has 648 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
